## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run settings:smoke`
- [ ] `npm run desktop:smoke`
- [ ] Installer checked when desktop packaging changed

## Risk Check

- [ ] No real API keys or private data committed
- [ ] No generated `release/`, `data/*.json`, `node_modules/`, or logs committed
- [ ] Settings and secrets migration considered if desktop data paths changed
